zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Burguillen Of Burford於1440年出生在英國薩默塞特布福德時，她的父親Robert Burguillon27歲，母親Mrs. Robert Burguillon23歲。她於1459年與John Bishop V在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年5月29日在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Burguillen Of Burford于1440年出生在英国薩默塞特布福德时，她的父亲Robert Burguillon27岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Burguillon23岁。她于1459年与John Bishop V在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年5月29日在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Burguillen Of Burford was born in 1440, in Burford, Somerset, England, her father, Robert Burguillon, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Burguillon, was 23. She married John Bishop V in 1459, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 29 May 1497, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Burguillen Of Burford est née en 1440, à Burford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Burguillon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Burguillon, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Bishop V en 1459, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1497, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Burguillen Of Burford 1440 in Burford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Burguillon 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert Burguillon 23. Sie hat 1459 in Wiltshire, England John Bishop V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1497 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

Lei sposato John Bishop V nel 1459, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 maggio 1497, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Burguillen Of Burfordが1440年にイギリスソメルセトブルフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Burguillonは27歳，母Mrs. Robert Burguillonは23歳であった。1459年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでJohn Bishop Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年5月29日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Burguillen Of Burford(이)가 1440년 영국 서머세트 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Burguillon(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Burguillon(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 윌츠히르에서 John Bishop V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 5월 29일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Bishop V em 1459, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1497, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Burguillen Of Burford родилась в 1440 г. в местности бурфорд, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Burguillon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Burguillon, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bishop V в 1459 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 мая 1497 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con John Bishop V en 1459, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1497, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
